title: graphistylis cuneifolia
intro: Graphistylis cuneifolia, also known as the wedge-leaved graphyton or wedge-leaved graphylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Graphistylis cuneifolia are said to include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
